attractions.name: Las Vegas Strip
attractions.summary: Las Vegas Strip is one of the more useful city districts to understand early if you want a clearer feel for how visitors actually spend time in Las Vegas.
attractions.heroTitle: Las Vegas Strip guide, things to do, and local tours
attractions.heroSummary: Planning guide for Las Vegas Strip in Las Vegas, with visitor basics and helpful local experiences.
thingsToDo: Treat Las Vegas Strip as an evening block if nightlife is a major part of the trip.
Plan time for a short sightseeing loop and nearby photo stops instead of only passing through.
planningTips: Plan Las Vegas Strip as part of a wider neighborhood or city block instead of making it the only stop in that part of the day.
If Las Vegas Strip matters most after dark, keep the rest of the day lighter so the evening does not feel rushed.
